item.title: Lawnmower Carb Fix for a V8
item.description: A lawnmower carb made this V8 sip fuel. The first clues are the funny part, and the fix is even better. What was the key clue?

media:content.media:title: Lawnmower Carb Fix for a V8
media:content.media:description: A lawnmower carb made this V8 sip fuel. The first clues are the funny part, and the fix is even better. What was the key clue?

item.title: A Dead D9 Dozer Fought Back
item.description: A D9 dozer gets a hands-on repair that was rougher than it looked, but the result made the effort worthwhile. A practical restoration with real shop work and a clear before-and-after outcome. What

media:content.media:title: A Dead D9 Dozer Fought Back
media:content.media:description: A D9 dozer gets a hands-on repair that was rougher than it looked, but the result made the effort worthwhile. A practical restoration with real shop work and a clear before-and-after outcome. What

item.title: Vintage Ford Cummins Swap
item.description: The swap gives this old truck the attitude it was missing. A Cummins engine swap changes the look and feel of this vintage Ford. What do you think of the build?

media:content.media:title: Vintage Ford Cummins Swap
media:content.media:description: The swap gives this old truck the attitude it was missing. A Cummins engine swap changes the look and feel of this vintage Ford. What do you think of the build?

item.title: This Scrap Handler Cab Was a Time Capsule
item.description: A look inside a scrap handler cab after all this time, with a focus on what was still inside and the garage tools used to inspect it. What do you think was found?

media:content.media:title: This Scrap Handler Cab Was a Time Capsule
media:content.media:description: A look inside a scrap handler cab after all this time, with a focus on what was still inside and the garage tools used to inspect it. What do you think was found?

item.title: Trailer Part Restored
item.description: A forgotten trailer part is brought back into use with hands-on garage work. The process shows practical repair and tool use from start to finish. What made the difference here?

media:content.media:title: Trailer Part Restored
media:content.media:description: A forgotten trailer part is brought back into use with hands-on garage work. The process shows practical repair and tool use from start to finish. What made the difference here?

item.title: Dead Iron Giant vs. a Cordless Impact
item.description: A long-idle piece of heavy equipment meets modern cordless power tools as the restoration process begins. Can today's technology conquer decades of rust and seized parts?

media:content.media:title: Dead Iron Giant vs. a Cordless Impact
media:content.media:description: A long-idle piece of heavy equipment meets modern cordless power tools as the restoration process begins. Can today's technology conquer decades of rust and seized parts?

item.title: What Was Hiding Under This '28 Studebaker?
item.description: A first look at a 1928 Studebaker project with restoration details that point to careful work ahead. What will the build reveal next?

media:content.media:title: What Was Hiding Under This '28 Studebaker?
media:content.media:description: A first look at a 1928 Studebaker project with restoration details that point to careful work ahead. What will the build reveal next?

item.title: Busting 40-Year-Old Nuts
item.description: One stuck fastener can decide whether the whole job moves forward. A look at the tools and technique used to free old hardware and keep the project moving. What would you reach for first?

media:content.media:title: Busting 40-Year-Old Nuts
media:content.media:description: One stuck fastener can decide whether the whole job moves forward. A look at the tools and technique used to free old hardware and keep the project moving. What would you reach for first?

item.title: K100 Restoration: Big Changes Done
item.description: Big changes are done, and now it’s time to see if this old truck still has any fight left. Will the K100 fire after 25 years dormant?

media:content.media:title: K100 Restoration: Big Changes Done
media:content.media:description: Big changes are done, and now it’s time to see if this old truck still has any fight left. Will the K100 fire after 25 years dormant?

item.title: Euclid Moves
item.description: Big iron like this never goes quietly. Watch what it takes to get the 45-ton Euclid moving again. What does it take to bring heavy equipment back to life?

media:content.media:title: Euclid Moves
media:content.media:description: Big iron like this never goes quietly. Watch what it takes to get the 45-ton Euclid moving again. What does it take to bring heavy equipment back to life?

item.title: K100 Build Update
item.description: Finishing one truck just opens space for the next project. In this update, the K100 build is nearly wrapped, and the shop turns to what comes next. What would you tackle next?

media:content.media:title: K100 Build Update
media:content.media:description: Finishing one truck just opens space for the next project. In this update, the K100 build is nearly wrapped, and the shop turns to what comes next. What would you tackle next?

item.title: The Family Charger Wakes Up
item.description: See what it took to bring this old dream car back to life and get it moving again. A closer look at the restoration work, before-and-after changes, and repair process. What stood out most?

media:content.media:title: The Family Charger Wakes Up
media:content.media:description: See what it took to bring this old dream car back to life and get it moving again. A closer look at the restoration work, before-and-after changes, and repair process. What stood out most?

item.title: A $100 Fix for a Dead Diesel Hydrostat
item.description: A dead diesel hydrostat can look like a major repair until the real culprit is found. This video follows the troubleshooting and fix process from diagnosis to repair. What would you check first?

media:content.media:title: A $100 Fix for a Dead Diesel Hydrostat
media:content.media:description: A dead diesel hydrostat can look like a major repair until the real culprit is found. This video follows the troubleshooting and fix process from diagnosis to repair. What would you check first?

item.title: The Final Bill on Our CAT F-350
item.description: It got expensive fast, but the result makes the pain easier to swallow. What do you think of the final result?

media:content.media:title: The Final Bill on Our CAT F-350
media:content.media:description: It got expensive fast, but the result makes the pain easier to swallow. What do you think of the final result?

item.title: Barn-Find Tractomotive: Will It Crank?
item.description: Old iron like this always has a story. In this barn-find restoration, we check whether the Tractomotive still has a heartbeat and what it takes to get it turning again. Will it crank?

media:content.media:title: Barn-Find Tractomotive: Will It Crank?
media:content.media:description: Old iron like this always has a story. In this barn-find restoration, we check whether the Tractomotive still has a heartbeat and what it takes to get it turning again. Will it crank?
